Tune parameters for the spatial sorting module

Source: R/search.R
tune_spatial_sorting.Rd

Pre-configures search_cmaes() or search_map_elites() with objective_spatial_sorting() and the key dispersal/sorting parameters.

Usage

tune_spatial_sorting(
  specs_base = default_specs(),
  n_iterations = 100L,
  method = "cmaes",
  ...
)

Arguments

specs_base

A specs list from default_specs(). dispersal_evolution and spatial_sorting are set automatically.

n_iterations

Integer (default 100L).

method

Character. "cmaes" (default) or "map_elites".

...

Additional arguments passed to the chosen search function.

Value

The result of search_cmaes() or search_map_elites().

See also

objective_spatial_sorting(), search_viability()

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
tuned <- tune_spatial_sorting(default_specs(), n_iterations = 50L)
tuned$specs$sorting_mating_boost
} # }
